UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC BODY, CORPORATE AND POLITIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADAMS, LATOYA ADAMS, KENNETH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 9 NORTHRIDGE ROAD, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT- CRC 522. INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES- CCP 415.46.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT ADAMS, LATOYA ADAMS, KENNETH ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
